item.title: Talented Tuesday

item.dc:creator: jrpsmith

item.title: Grandpa Probably Needs A Checkup
item.description: "Trump is falling concerningly short of any standard of fitness for office and displaying alarming characteristics of declining acuity," the 238 signatories wrote in a letter dated Oct. 13 and first obtained by CBS News. "In the limited opportunities we can examine his behavior, he's providing a deeply concerning snapshot." "As we all age, we lose sharpness and revert to base instincts. We are seeing that from Trump, as he uses his rallies and appearances to ramble, meander, and crudely lash out at his many perceived grievances," the doctors wrote. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/trump-health-records-doctors-for-harris/
item.dc:creator: SOinsanity365

item.title: Sky News is operated by Rupert Murdoch, a fanatical Zionist with deep political and economic ties to the Israeli state.
item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: Memes and things vol 121
item.description:
Seriously. I love it when people remember lil trivia about me
I call Stardew a “just one more thing” game. Sims and Animal Crossing are like this for me.
Let me romance hat mouse!
Nubbin (my cat) has a nub leg in the back so he can’t jump up on things. A few times a week, my partner carries Nubbin around the house to show him places and things he can’t get to.
I have been written up at a job for being too nice. I’m not even kidding.
Fish juice.
I have a chronic illness and I can assure you that it is, in fact, chronic. And painful. So goddamn painful.
Mortal Kombat me.
All hail the glow cloud.
Special delivery! It’s Nubbin!
item.dc:creator: razalude

Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.description: Our system clearly is beyond broken. Why is this a close election? Reality is irrelevant now.
item.dc:creator: actinginacave

item.title: 21 weeks of no booze.
item.description: It's been awhile since I posted. I feel a lot better and feel better about myself. Recently a friend I haven't seen in years came and stayed with us. He got pass out drunk each night. It was like looking at who I used to be. And now when I'm in the company of others who get drunk it's interesting being sober. It's like no, I probably wasn't as funny as I thought I was because people simply start acting dumber and dumber. I still worry someday I'll relapse. I joined AA months ago and many there went years of no drinking only to then get right back where they left off. In the meantime also cutting down on the junk food.
item.dc:creator: oldradios19772000

item.title: Convo with my mom
item.description:
My mom has been dealing with some serious grief and depression. She started doing a lot of faith deconstruction and stopped going to church. Before she left, she started a ministry to buy soap and other personal care items to supplement the food pantry they have.
my partner confirms
she works as an in-home nurse for heavily handicapped people, so she sees real need in the world and spends a ton of her own money to help them.
I'm Christian left, but my mom is still somehow republican. Hoping she keeps going in this direction and not down unnecessary guilt trip land.
item.dc:creator: StrangerRangerDanger

item.dc:creator: definitelyanormalhuman

item.title: “I thought, ‘A message in a bottle? Cool!’” Dowker.She then called out to her part-time employee, Rob Hemmer, who also works at a nearby local history museum.“Rob picked the broken cork out of the bottle with his jackknife and dumped out the water, then w
item.description: The note read: “Will the person who finds this bottle return this paper to George Morrow, Cheboygan, Michigan, and tell where it was found?” It was dated November 1926. Dowker told The Post that she immediately posted about the bottle on her company’s Facebook page in hopes of finding someone who knew George. “So look what I found when I was washing windows and cruising along with the fish,” she wrote. “Any Morrows out there know a George Morrow that would’ve written this circa 1926?” A helpful internet stranger, René Szatkowski, found a way to get in contact with George’s daughter, Michele Primeau, whom she found through George’s online obituary. So, when she called Primeau, she said: “You don’t know me and this may be really strange, but there are people looking for you on the internet.” As it turns out, George sent the message off right around his 18th birthday. “My dad was born in November, and I can just picture him going down to the river on his 18th birthday and tossing the bottle in,” Primeau told The Pos George died in 1995 of causes related to dementia, his daughter said. Although Dowker wanted to return the note to George’s loved ones, Primeau said she decided that the note should stay with the person who discovered it. “Wouldn’t it be nice if Jenn could keep it in her office so everyone who came in could see it?” she said. “It will be a way for my dad to live on. I really like the idea of sharing it.” #explorepage #vintage #pen #modern #furniture #reels #vintage #vintagestyle #vintagefashion #clothes #furnituredesign #wholesome #beauty #wholesome #wholesomememes #fashion #fashionshow #viral #cars #commercial #hair #hairtutorial #couples #nostalgia
item.dc:creator: JunkiSuperBandit
